description_long: This is a sleek, modern military-style jet airplane with a sharply pointed nose, a single large engine exhaust at the rear, and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are sharply swept back in a delta configuration, with additional small canard surfaces near the nose for enhanced maneuverability. The cockpit is enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage, and appears to be a single-seat design. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, giving it a classic fighter jet silhouette. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The exterior is primarily metallic gray with subtle panel lines and minimal visible markings.
description: A modern, metallic gray jet airplane with swept delta wings, a single rear engine, and a blue-tinted forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large single engine exhaust, swept delta wings, and twin horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pointed nose, blue cockpit canopy, canard surfaces, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the sharp nose, forward cockpit, canards, and the symmetry of the swept wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the landing gear, canards, and overall streamlined profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta wings with small forward canards and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with a large exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, all deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
